retry_reason: put_device is unconditional and always decrements the refcount; once called, the reference is released permanently; retrying would cause a double-put with use-after-free risk.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: releases a reference on the DMA device (param->dma_dev) that was previously acquired in byt_serial_setup via pci_get_slot. After calling this function, the caller must not use the device pointer unless another reference is held. This function is part of the cleanup/exit path and should be called exactly once for each reference acquired.
